title: Korean Lesson for Beginners: Greetings & Basic Phrases
description: Start your Korean journey with the most essential greetings and phrases. Perfect for absolute beginners.

title: Yes, No, and Thank You in Korean
description: Learn the most commonly used Korean words — yes, no, and thank you — plus when to use formal vs. informal speech.

title: 한글 기초: 자음과 모음 배우기 (Hangul Basics)
description: Learn the Korean alphabet (Hangul) step by step — consonants, vowels, and how to combine them into syllables.

title: Korean Food Culture: A Guide to Hansik
description: Discover the rich culture behind Korean cuisine — from kimchi to bibimbap, explore the stories behind beloved Korean dishes.

title: Seoul Travel Guide: Must-See Places & Tips
description: Explore Seoul's iconic landmarks — from Gyeongbokgung Palace to Hongdae. Learn travel vocabulary while discovering the city.

title: Korean Traditional Culture: Hanbok & Customs
description: Learn about Korea's traditional clothing (Hanbok), customs, and cultural etiquette through engaging narration.

title: Intermediate Korean: Expressing Emotions & Feelings
description: Move beyond basics and learn how to express nuanced emotions and feelings in natural Korean conversation.

title: Korean History Documentary: The Story of Korea
description: An engaging look at Korea's remarkable history — from the Three Kingdoms era to modern times. Rich historical vocabulary throughout.
